description: This file is a Java class that configures security settings for a Spring Boot application. It sets up JWT authentication, CORS policies, security filter chains, and endpoint access rules for the application.

classes.name: SecurityConfig
classes.description: Spring Security configuration for stateless JWT authentication, including CORS setup and security filter chain definition.

methods.name: corsConfigurationSource
methods.description: Defines CORS configuration allowing specific origin patterns, methods, headers, and preflight caching duration.

methods.name: securityFilterChain
methods.description: Sets up the security filter chain with CSRF disabled, CORS, stateless session management, exception handling, endpoint authorization, and JWT filter integration.
